---
title: "Attention and Working Memory: Evidence Page"
subtitle: "Type your responses, save as PDF, and submit as evidence"
---

::: {.callout-important title="Submission workflow"}
Complete the response boxes on this page. Your answers are saved only in this browser on this device. When finished, click **Print / Save PDF** and upload the PDF to D2L if assigned.
:::

::: {.callout-warning title="Important"}
Do not switch browsers or devices before saving your PDF. This page uses local browser storage, not a server.
:::

```{=html}
<style>
  .evidence-panel {
    border: 1px solid #d8e0e8;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1rem;
    margin: 1.2rem 0;
    background: #f7f9fb;
  }
  .evidence-panel textarea,
  .evidence-panel input[type="text"] {
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    border: 1px solid #c7d1db;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: .75rem;
    font: inherit;
    background: white;
  }
  .evidence-panel textarea { min-height: 115px; }
  .evidence-panel label { font-weight: 700; display: block; margin: .5rem 0 .25rem; }
  .evidence-controls { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .5rem; margin: .7rem 0; }
  .evidence-controls button, .print-btn {
    border: 0;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: .65rem .9rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    background: #25476a;
    color: white;
    cursor: pointer;
  }
  .evidence-controls button.secondary { background: #e9eef4; color: #17212b; }
  .progress-wrap {
    border: 1px solid #d8e0e8;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: white;
    margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem;
  }
  .bar { height: 16px; background: #e9eef4; border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; }
  .bar-fill { height: 100%; width: 0%; background: #25476a; transition: width .25s ease; }
  .small { font-size: .92rem; color: #586574; }
  .mini-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: .75rem; }
  @media (max-width: 680px) { .mini-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
  @media print {
    .evidence-controls, .print-btn, .no-print, iframe { display: none !important; }
    textarea { border: 1px solid #777 !important; min-height: 95px; }
    body { font-size: 11.5pt; }
    .evidence-panel { break-inside: avoid; background: white; }
  }
</style>

<div class="progress-wrap">
  <strong>Progress:</strong> <span id="progressText">0% complete</span>
  <div class="bar" aria-hidden="true"><div class="bar-fill" id="progressFill"></div></div>
  <p class="small">Progress counts response boxes with at least 40 characters and completed name/date fields.</p>
  <button class="print-btn" onclick="window.print()">Print / Save PDF</button>
</div>

<div class="evidence-panel">
  <div class="mini-grid">
    <div>
      <label for="student_name">Name</label>
      <input id="student_name" type="text" data-evidence="true" placeholder="Type your name">
    </div>
    <div>
      <label for="student_date">Date</label>
      <input id="student_date" type="text" data-evidence="true" placeholder="Type the date">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

# 1. Try the backward digit span demo

This activity demonstrates working memory because you must **hold** the digits and **manipulate** their order.

```{=html}
<iframe src="../interactives/digit-span.html" title="Backward Digit Span Working Memory Demo" width="100%" height="820" style="border: 1px solid #d8e0e8; border-radius: 14px;"></iframe>
```

# 2. Record what happened

```{=html}
<div class="evidence-panel">
  <label for="wm_result">What was the longest backward digit span you completed correctly? What happened as the digit string got longer?</label>
  <textarea id="wm_result" data-evidence="true" placeholder="Example: I got 4 digits correct, but 5 became difficult because..."></textarea>
  <div class="evidence-controls">
    <button class="secondary" onclick="clearBox('wm_result')">Clear</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

# 3. Explain the psychology

```{=html}
<div class="evidence-panel">
  <label for="wm_difficulty">Explain why backward digit span is harder than simply repeating digits forward. Use the words <em>storage</em> and <em>manipulation</em>.</label>
  <textarea id="wm_difficulty" data-evidence="true" placeholder="Type your explanation here..."></textarea>
  <div class="evidence-controls">
    <button class="secondary" onclick="clearBox('wm_difficulty')">Clear</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

# 4. Apply it to studying

```{=html}
<div class="evidence-panel">
  <label for="wm_apply">How does working-memory overload help explain why rereading while distracted often fails?</label>
  <textarea id="wm_apply" data-evidence="true" placeholder="Connect working memory to distracted studying..."></textarea>
  <div class="evidence-controls">
    <button class="secondary" onclick="clearBox('wm_apply')">Clear</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

# 5. Make it personal

```{=html}
<div class="evidence-panel">
  <label for="wm_personal">Describe one real study habit of yours that either protects working memory or overloads it. What specific change could you try before the next quiz?</label>
  <textarea id="wm_personal" data-evidence="true" placeholder="Describe your habit and one change..."></textarea>
  <div class="evidence-controls">
    <button class="secondary" onclick="clearBox('wm_personal')">Clear</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-important title="Final check"}
Before submitting, make sure your responses show that you actually processed the activity. A strong response does not need to be long, but it should use psychology vocabulary and apply the demo to studying.
:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function(){
  const pageKey = 'psy101_active_wm_v2_no_model_answers';

  function saveElement(el) {
    const data = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(pageKey) || '{}');
    data[el.id] = el.value;
    localStorage.setItem(pageKey, JSON.stringify(data));
    updateProgress();
  }

  function restore() {
    const data = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(pageKey) || '{}');
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-evidence="true"]').forEach(el => {
      if (data[el.id]) el.value = data[el.id];
    });
    updateProgress();
  }

  function updateProgress() {
    const els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-evidence="true"]'));
    let done = 0;
    els.forEach(el => {
      const min = el.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'textarea' ? 40 : 2;
      if ((el.value || '').trim().length >= min) done++;
    });
    const pct = Math.round((done / els.length) * 100);
    const fill = document.getElementById('progressFill');
    const text = document.getElementById('progressText');
    if (fill) fill.style.width = pct + '%';
    if (text) text.textContent = pct + '% complete';
  }

  window.clearBox = function(id) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    el.value = '';
    saveElement(el);
  };

  document.addEventListener('input', e => {
    if (e.target.matches('[data-evidence="true"]')) saveElement(e.target);
  });
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', restore);
  restore();
})();
</script>
```
